Setting.changePasswordDescription: To change your password please visit our dedicated password reset page found by
Setting.closeAccountDescription: To close your account, please visit our dedicated account closure page by
Setting.marketingConsentDescription: We use your personal data to send personalised promotions and product updates, and you can choose your preferred communication channels or opt out at any time.
Setting.marketingRestriction: Your marketing preferences are currently locked due to account restrictions.

changePasswordDialog.title: Change password
changePasswordDialog.successDescription: Your password has been updated! Please log in for your security
changePasswordDialog.updateFailedDescription: The current password you entered is incorrect. Please try again later.

closeAccountDialog.title: Close your account
closeAccountDialog.subtitle: We're sorry to see you go!
closeAccountDialog.description: Before you close your account, please take a moment to check a few things:

needABreak.title: Need a break?
needABreak.description: If you just want some time off, you can set play limits or take a short break instead.

withdrawBalance.title: Withdraw your balance
withdrawBalance.description: Don't forget to withdraw any remaining funds before closing your account. If your balance is below the minimum withdrawal amount, you can find more details

personalData.title: Your personal data
personalData.description: After your account is closed, we'll handle your information according to our Data Retention Policy.
personalData.descriptionExtra: Any data we don't need to keep for legal reasons will be safely deleted or anonymised.

confirmCloseAccount.title: Are you sure you want to close your account?
confirmCloseAccount.description: Closing your account is permanent and cannot be undone. If you're sure, please click the button below to proceed.

mfa.mfaDescription: Enable two-factor authentication by clicking ‘Activate’ and following the on-screen instructions.
mfa.mfaEnabledDescription: Your account is secured with two-factor authentication. Click 'Deactivate' to disable this feature.
mfa.recoveryCodeDescription: Please make sure you have saved your codes in a secure place
mfa.trustDeviceCheckboxLabel: Trust this device and don't ask for {day} days

active.title: Activate Two Factor Authentication
active.step1Desc: Download an authentication app such as <app>Google Authenticator</app>.
active.step2Desc: Open the app and scan the QR code below.
active.step2QrCode: If you can't use a QR code, enter this code below
active.step3Desc: Enter a 6-digit authentication code from the app:

deactive.title: Deactivation of two-factor authentication
deactive.otpDescription: To disable 2FA, enter the code from Google Authenticator
deactive.recoveryCodeDescription: To disable two-factor authentication, enter your Security Code

verify.otpDescription: To continue, please enter the 6-digit verification code generated by your two-factor authentication app.
verify.recoveryCodeDescription: If you are unable to access your two-factor device, enter one of your recovery codes to verify your identity.

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete your Payout Profile?

limitTypeEnum.LOSS_LIMIT_NOTE: The loss limit you set refers to the amount of money you will allow yourself to spend during a defined period.
limitTypeEnum.WAGER_LIMIT_NOTE: The max wager limit represents the maximum sum that one can wager per specific vertical.
limitTypeEnum.MAX_WAGER_LIMIT_NOTE: The wager limit represents the sum of your wager over a specified period of time. You can reach your wager limit even though you are on a winning streak.
limitTypeEnum.DEPOSIT_LIMIT_NOTE: The deposit limit you set refers to the amount of money you will allow yourself to deposit during a defined period.

limitConfirm.confirmDescription: For your security, requests to increase limits are subject to a <time></time> cooling-off period. Your new limit will officially take effect on <cooldown></cooldown>.
limitConfirm.confirmCancelDescription: For your security, requests to cancel a limit change are subject to a <time></time> cooling-off period. This cancellation will officially take effect on <cooldown></cooldown>.

sessionLimits.title: Session Limits
sessionLimits.description: The session time limit refers to the amount of time you will allow yourself to spend playing continuously.

sessionLimits.title: Session Limits
sessionLimits.description: The session time limit refers to the amount of time you will allow yourself to spend playing.

sessionLimits.title: Session Limits
sessionLimits.description: The session time limit refers to the amount of time you will allow yourself to spend playing continuously.

periodSession.title: Period of the session limit
periodSession.description: Period of time during which the session limit will be applied.

cooldown.title: Cooling down period
cooldown.description: Period of time after which you can play again after exhausting your time limit.

confirmDialog.title:
Limit increase request
pending activation
confirmDialog.description:
For your security, requests to increase limits are subject to a <bold>{coolingOffPeriod}</bold> cooling-off period.
Your new limit will officially take effect on <bold>{effectiveTime}</bold>.

cancelConfirmDialog.title: Confirm cancellation request
cancelConfirmDialog.description: For your security, requests to cancel a limit change are subject to a <bold>{coolingOffPeriod}</bold> cooling-off period. This cancellation will officially take effect on <bold>{effectiveTime}</bold>.

selfExclusion.title: Self-exclusion
selfExclusion.description: Choose a longer break if you want to stop playing for several months or permanently.

shortBreak.title: Cooling-Off
shortBreak.description: Select a temporary timeout to pause your play for a short period of time.

shortBreakConfirmDialog.title: Confirm cooling-off
shortBreakConfirmDialog.intro: You are about to activate a cooling-off on your account.
shortBreakConfirmDialog.accessDescription: During this period, betting will be disabled, but you can still log in to manage your balance or withdraw funds.
shortBreakConfirmDialog.cancellationDescription: This cooling-off cannot be cancelled until the selected period ends.
shortBreakConfirmDialog.readyDescription: Please make sure you are ready before confirming.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm self-exclusion
confirmDialog.intro: You are about to activate self-exclusion on your account.
confirmDialog.accessDescription: During this period, you will not be able to log in, play, or use any of our services.
confirmDialog.cancellationDescription: This action cannot be cancelled until the selected period ends.
confirmDialog.readyDescription: Please ensure you are ready before confirming.

Questionnaire.name: Name
Questionnaire.submitSuccess: Your answer has been submitted successfully.

UnsavedChangeDialog.title: Alert
UnsavedChangeDialog.description:
Please save your changes before switching tabs.
 Leaving this page will discard your current input and restore previous data.

description.p1: We use <necessary>Necessary</necessary> cookies to keep our website running smoothly and secure.
description.p2: With your consent, we also use non-essential <types>Functional, Marketing, Analytics</types> cookies to personalize your journey and measure your site's performance.
description.p3: You can still use the basic site with non-essential cookies turned off, but some extra features may not be available.
description.p4: Click <accept>Accept</accept> to enable your selected cookies, or choose Accept Necessary Cookies Only to allow essential cookies only. You can update your preferences at any time.

deposit.successDescription:
Your payment has been completed successfully.
The amount has been added to your balance.
deposit.inProgressDescription:
The request is processing on payment provider side.
Please check back later in the transaction history.
deposit.failDescription:
There was a problem and we could not complete your request.
Please try again or contact us on <email>support@gmail.com</email>

withdraw.successDescription:
Your withdrawal request has been submitted successfully.
Please check back later in the transaction history.
withdraw.failDescription:
There was a problem and we could not complete your request.
Please try again or contact us on <email>support@gmail.com</email>.

contactForm.title: Any questions or suggestions?
contactForm.description: Write to us and one of our colleagues will contact you as soon as possible

fields.name: Name
fields.consent: Please confirm you consent to your personal information being processed and shared with third parties

contactForm.submitSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully
contactForm.submitFailed: Submission failed. Please try again later
contactForm.successDescription: Thank you for reaching out. One of our colleagues will contact you as soon as possible.
